metadata.description: 14×49 G₂/SIC coefficient tensor α^(a)_{p,q} for Paper 10
metadata.fiducial_source: UMass/QBism database d=7 SIC fiducial (RIRI form)

key_results.abghm_note: The ABGHM 2022 Stark-unit fiducial as transcribed in the ChatGPT research report does NOT satisfy the SIC condition with standard WH(7) X,Z operators (6/48 correct overlaps). Its 49 displaced states DO span gl(7,C) (rank-49 Gram matrix). Possible cause: basis-convention mismatch between 'Fano-labeled basis' and standard computational basis. Computation uses verified UMass/QBism SIC fiducial instead.
